body:
The Review Interest Office is responsible for

  • Maintaining the relevant dates for interest purposes in respect of liabilities on the SA record
  • Dealing with interest objections

The following list shows the functions linked to the role of Review Interest Officer available, with access to the same functions, in an office with processing, technical or recovery responsibilities.

For details of how to access any of these functions, select ‘Index Of Functions’ on the left of the screen.

On accessing the function, system help is available to you at function, screen, field, and error message levels.

For ease of reference, the functions are grouped under the following sub-headings

Compliance
Office
Statements
Taxpayer

Compliance

View Compliance History

Office

Maintain Responsible Office

Retrieve UTR from D Reference

Statements

Amend Effective Date of Payment

Amend Relevant Dates

Apply Surcharge

Maintain Surcharge

View Payment Details

View Statement

Taxpayer

Case Summary

Maintain SA Notes
title: Manage work: access to records: review interest officer - processing and recovery office
